title: New album of Alphabets remixes available as pay-what-you-want download on Bandcamp
body:
Brief Westword notice announcing the release of REMIX10 as a pay-what-you-want download on Bandcamp. Confirms the December 2010 release window. No author or specific date confirmed.

## Sources
- [Westword](https://www.westword.com/music/new-album-of-alphabets-remixes-available-as-pay-what-you-want-download-on-bandcamp-5675339)
